title: premna odorata
intro: Premna odorata, also known as Indian cigar or paila, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Premna odorata include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its use in treating fever, skin conditions, and digestive problems. Premna odorata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
